name: PayRun
description: Represents a payroll processing run for a pay group covering a specific pay period.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique identifier for the pay run

properties.name: descriptor
properties.description: Human-readable name of the pay run

properties.name: payGroup
properties.description: Reference to the associated pay group

properties.name: payPeriod
properties.description: The pay period covered by this run

properties.name: startDate
properties.description: Start date of the pay period

properties.name: endDate
properties.description: End date of the pay period

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current status of the pay run

properties.name: totalGrossPay
properties.description: Total gross pay for the pay run

properties.name: totalNetPay
properties.description: Total net pay for the pay run

properties.name: totalDeductions
properties.description: Total deductions for the pay run

properties.name: totalTaxes
properties.description: Total tax withholdings for the pay run

properties.name: workerCount
properties.description: Number of workers included in the pay run

properties.name: createdOn
properties.description: When the pay run was created

properties.name: completedOn
properties.description: When the pay run was completed
